TORNADO REPORTED BY SPOTTER AT AROUND 844 PM. TORNADO TOUCHED DOWN IN SOUTHWEST BETHEL, NEAR FOSSYL DRIVE, AND MOVED EAST-SOUTHEAST, DOWNING A TREE LIMB ON SOUTH ASH STREET. TORNADO HAD PATH WIDTH OF 20 YARDS, AND STAYED ON THE GROUND FOR 0.50 MILES. NO SIGNIFICANT DAMAGE REPORTED.
